paper.title: Theoretical and experimental analysis of timber-to-timber joints connected with inclined screws
paper.authors: Roberto Tomasi; Alessandro Crosatti; Maurizio Piazza
paper.notes: Timber joint mechanics paper; strength refers to screw/joint load-bearing, not cement compressive strength.

evidence.evidence_text: Timber joint mechanics paper; strength refers to screw/joint load-bearing, not cement compressive strength.
